meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop staring at a blank screen. Use this intermediate guide to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: When you have no project ideas, stop searching for 'the next big thing' and start building 'the next better flow.' User onboarding is the highest-leverage feature in SaaS. By mastering onboarding UX, you create a repeatable, high-value service offering that solves client churn and builds your technical portfolio instantly.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve mastered the stack, but the inspiration well has run dry, leaving you stuck in a cycle of tutorial hell. You don't need a revolutionary product idea; you need a high-impact technical niche that clients are desperate to pay for.

User onboarding is the silent killer of SaaS growth. Most founders have leaky funnels, and they are begging for someone to fix them. By shifting your focus from 'what to build' to 'how to onboard,' you transform from a struggling developer into a conversion-focused architect. Let's build your reputation by mastering the art of the first impression.

steps.title: Audit the Friction Points
steps.description: Identify the 'Time-to-Value' gap in a standard SaaS flow. Use Claude Code to analyze an existing repo and map the user journey from signup to first action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and generate a 5-step user onboarding flow that reduces time-to-value by 40%. Focus on progressive disclosure and contextual tooltips.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map user journey and identify 3 friction points in signup flow'

steps.title: Architect the State Machine
steps.description: Onboarding is inherently stateful. Define the user's progress through an onboarding checklist to ensure they don't get lost.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust state management pattern for a multi-step onboarding wizard using React and XState.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/OnboardingWizard.tsx --prompt 'implement state machine for 4-step user setup'

steps.title: Build Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate lightweight, non-intrusive tooltips that guide the user without blocking the interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable React Tooltip component that anchors to DOM elements and supports keyboard navigation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create accessible tooltip component with framer-motion animations'

steps.title: Implement Data-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Tailor the onboarding experience based on user-provided input. If they are a developer, show API docs; if they are a marketer, show templates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow to accept a user profile object and conditionally render onboarding steps based on the user's role.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --prompt 'add logic to switch onboarding content based on user role'

steps.title: Deploy Analytics Hooks
steps.description: You cannot improve what you do not measure. Add event tracking to every onboarding step to identify where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tracking utility that hooks into the onboarding state machine and fires events to PostHog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/utils/analytics.ts --prompt 'integrate posthog events for onboarding completion tracking'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a tour they don't want is the fastest way to increase churn.
Use 'Empty States' as onboarding opportunities. If there's no data, use that space to guide the user on how to create their first entry.
Implement 'Progressive Disclosure.' Don't ask for profile details until the user has actually performed their first action.
Treat your onboarding code as a separate module. It should be easily swappable for A/B testing different flows.
Use URL query parameters to trigger specific onboarding flows, allowing you to create custom landing pages for different marketing campaigns.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, reach out to 5 local SaaS founders, show them your demo, and offer to audit their current onboarding process for a flat fee.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Master the technical skills that pay, build a portfolio that proves your worth, and start solving real business problems for paying clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
